subject: Weekly News: 20/01/2046
preview: Recovered phone footage from the New Year's Eve tunnel incident.
bodyHtml:
Footage recovered from a mobile phone is believed to be linked to the New Year's Eve incident in Lower Manhattan.

Early reports suggest the video shows an underground gathering shortly before several individuals were reported missing.

images.captionHtml: The phone was found near the Statue of Liberty and later spread on social media.
